name: huat-business-advisory-board
description: Huat Board: a business advisory board skill for Claude. Runs a business decision through 5 functional leaders who peer-review each other and synthesize a verdict.

plugins.name: business-advisory-board
plugins.description: Run a business decision through an advisory board of 5 functional leaders (Innovator, CFO, COO, General Counsel, Growth Lead) who independently analyze it, peer-review each other anonymously, and synthesize a verdict.
